All Categories

Delivery Information

At UAE IPTV BOX, we aim to provide a smooth and reliable delivery experience for our customers.

1. Order Processing

All orders are confirmed through our official WhatsApp channel. Once an order is verified, we begin processing and preparing the shipment.

2. Delivery Areas

We primarily deliver within the United Arab Emirates (UAE). Delivery availability may vary depending on location.

3. Delivery Time

Estimated delivery times are typically provided during order confirmation via WhatsApp. Delivery schedules may vary based on product availability and destination.

4. Cash on Delivery (COD)

We offer Cash on Delivery (COD) for eligible orders. Customers are requested to ensure availability at the provided delivery address at the agreed time.

5. Delivery Charges

Delivery charges, if applicable, will be communicated during the order confirmation process.

6. Failed Deliveries

If a delivery attempt fails due to incorrect address details or customer unavailability, we may reschedule delivery. Additional charges may apply in certain cases.

7. Inspection Upon Delivery

Customers are encouraged to inspect the product at the time of delivery. Any visible damage or issues should be reported immediately.

8. Contact Information

WhatsApp: 0502368942

Email: uaeiptvbox@gmail.com

offers IPTV boxes and TV subscriptions with global access, crystal-clear streaming, and 24/7 expert support-your gateway to non-stop entertainment.
